name: Al Madrigal
bio: Al Madrigal is an American comedian and actor known for a story-based style centered on family, fatherhood, and his Mexican-Sicilian background. He rose to national attention as a correspondent on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and co-founded the All Things Comedy podcast network with Bill Burr. His specials include Why Is the Rabbit Crying? and Shrimpin Aint Easy.

timeline.ev: Wins the jury award for best stand-up at the U.S. Comedy Arts Festival
Comedy Central Presents half-hour special airs
Joins The Daily Show as a correspondent
Co-founds the All Things Comedy podcast network with Bill Burr
First hour special Why Is the Rabbit Crying? premieres
Showtime special Shrimpin Aint Easy released

accolades: Best Stand-up Comedian jury award at the 2004 U.S. Comedy Arts Festival
Why Is the Rabbit Crying? named a top 10 comedy special of 2013 by Westword and The Village Voice
Co-founder of the All Things Comedy podcast network
